introSection: Matterhorn Blitz is a custom wild mouse roller coaster located at Europa-Park in Rust, Baden Wuerttemberg, Germany. Built by Mack Rides, the ride opened on 25 March 1999. Unlike other wild mouse coasters, it features an elevator lift instead of a chain lift hill.

sections.title: Colour scheme
sections.content: Dark blue track and dark green supports.

fullText:
Matterhorn Blitz is a custom wild mouse roller coaster located at Europa-Park in Rust, Baden Wuerttemberg, Germany. Built by Mack Rides, the ride opened on 25 March 1999. Unlike other wild mouse coasters, it features an elevator lift instead of a chain lift hill.



Dark blue track and dark green supports.
